final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
Short term loan and Utilized bank overdraft facility

variables.notes: Included the explicit current portion of long-term debt excluding leases plus the separate short-term loan/overdraft component. Did not use lease rows. Manual review because current debt may also include other short-term borrowing components (e.g., commercial paper) and the decomposition is somewhat ambiguous.
